calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery; And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. 1. Plaintiff Sofia Rodriguez's Motion to Compel Answers to Post-Judgment Discovery to defendant Felix Enrique Aguilar granted.
a. All objections to Judgment Creditor's Post-Judgment Demand For Production of Documents [Set One], and Post-Judgment Interrogatories [Set One] to defendant Felix Enrique Aguilar-except attorney-client and attorney work product privileges-are waived;
b. Judgment Debtor Felix Enrique Aguilar shall provide full, complete and verified responses to Judgment Creditor's Post-Judgment Demand For Production of Documents [Set One] and Post-Judgment Interrogatories [Set One] within 10 days of the date of this Order;
2. Motion to Compel Answers to Post-Judgment Discovery to defendant Luis O. Pazo granted.
a. All objections to Judgment Creditor's Post-Judgment Demand For Production of Documents [Set One], and Post-Judgment Interrogatories [Set One] to defendant Luis O. Pazo-except attorney-client and attorney work product privileges-are waived;
b. Judgment Debtor Luis O. Pazo shall provide full, complete and verified responses to Judgment Creditor's Post-Judgment Demand For Production of Documents [Set One] and Post-Judgment Interrogatories [Set One] within 10 days of the date of this Order;
3. Request for sanctions granted:
a. Sanctions shall issue against each defendant in the sum of $300.00;
b. Order for sanctions stayed for 10 days from date of this Order;
c. For each party who provides full, complete and verified responses to Judgment Creditor's Post-Judgment Demand For Production of Documents [Set One] and Post-Judgment Interrogatories [Set One] within 10 days as ordered, sanctions shall be permanently stayed. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
